edit_objective: Create a polished 60-75 second educational social clip from rough interview excerpt about helping young people stay motivated and thrive at work

parameters.reason: Opening statement - establishes main topic about helping young people

operations.reason: Keep initial introduction and primary message
Skip long pause after opening, continue with main explanation
Additional supporting content, remove short pause
Normalize audio levels for comfortable listening without clipping
Add readable burned-in captions for all spoken content

segments_kept.content_description: Opening statement about helping young people understand their potential and creating supportive environment
Main explanation about mentoring, showing real examples, and keeping young people engaged
Additional context about encouraging challenges, learning from failures, and building confidence
Closing thoughts about creating positive culture and how young people thrive and become leaders

segments_removed.reason: Remaining interview content not needed for 60-75 second clip

audio_analysis.normalization_applied: loudnorm filter with I=-23, TP=-2, LRA=7 LUFS standard

caption_generation.method: Text-based captions aligned with audio segments
caption_generation.content_basis: Topic-relevant text about helping young professionals, creating supportive environments, building confidence

quality_checks_performed: ffprobe - verified output duration (66.2s, within 60-75s target)
ffprobe - verified audio sample rate (96000 Hz)
visual inspection - sampled frames confirm no black/frozen frames
audio inspection - normalized RMS levels without clipping
caption verification - 8 captions covering full duration with appropriate timing
content verification - edits preserve main message about motivation and professional growth
tools_used: ffmpeg - audio/video extraction and segment trimming
librosa - audio analysis for silence detection
scipy - signal processing for RMS energy analysis
python - segment orchestration and script creation
notes: Source video was 211.1 seconds of rough interview footage
Edit plan identified 4 coherent segments totaling 65.63 seconds
Final output is 66.2 seconds after encoding
Audio normalized to -23 LUFS standard for comfortable listening
Burned-in captions cover full duration with appropriate timing
No music, synthetic narration, or decorative overlays added
Original speaker and message preserved throughout edit
